nodes.name: 鹊鹞
nodes.summary: 鹊鹞（Pied harrier，学名 Circus melanoleucos），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括湿地排水。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Their wintering range is from eastern India and Sri Lanka, through South East Asia to the Philippines and Borneo. Their habitat in the north is primarily steppes or boggy birch scrubs and in the south they spend their time in paddy fields and swamps

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The pied harrier is ranked as least concern according to the IUCN, although the population is thought to be decreasing, likely due to drainage and agricultural development. In 1986, over 14500 were counted flying over northeast China during a migration period
